name: Paul's Burgers on the Grill
recipeIngredient: lettuce leaves and tomato slices -- optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients in a medium bowl; mix well.
2. Shape into four patties.
3. Grill over medium coals for 4-5 minutes per side or until no longer pink.
4. Serve on buns; top with lettuce and tomato if desired.
